approaches.title: Check each row against its cyclically shifted version
approaches.summary: For every matrix row, compare each element with the element at the corresponding cyclic-shifted index. The later revisions simplify the shift handling and ref##

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial O(n*m)-time, O(1)-space implementation; alternates shift direction between rows.

revisions.commitComment: left shift === right shift when invariant
revisions.rawCommitSubject: 2946: left shift === right shift when invariant
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Recognizes that equality under a cyclic shift is direction-invariant, so one shift can be used for every row.
Refactors the same row-and-element comparisons using Rust iterators and keeps the shift index unsigned.
